changes.description: Replaced verbose 295-line SKILL.md (with reference.md, forms.md, and 8 scripts) with a focused 70-line version covering only pdfplumber extraction and reportlab creation. Removed all unused auxiliary files (reference.md, forms.md, LICENSE.txt, scripts/). Added critical note about calling doc.build() exactly once. Included concrete examples matching both task patterns: structured JSON extraction from tables, and employee report PDF creation with title page, data table, and summary section.
